description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a distinctive urban warrior appearance. He is shirtless, revealing a tattoo on his chest and upper arm, and wears a single-shoulder strap with a padded element crossing his torso. His lower body is dressed in loose, knee-length pants with wrappings around his calves, and he is barefoot. The figure's hair is styled in a short cut with a topknot ponytail at the back. The skin is smooth and the overall look is athletic, with defined musculature and a confident stance. The attire and accessories suggest a blend of modern and traditional influences, suitable for a dynamic urban environment.
description: A muscular, shirtless adult male with a tattoo, single-shoulder strap, loose pants, calf wrappings, and a topknot ponytail, standing barefoot in an athletic pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tattoo on the chest, the single-shoulder strap, and the defined musculature.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, arm tattoo, and the profile of the shoulder strap and calf wrappings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back muscles, the way the strap crosses the back, and the full length of the pants and wrappings.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the ponytail, the strap's attachment, and the side profile of the pants and wrappings.
attribute_clothing_type: asymmetrical shoulder strap, loose knee-length pants, calf wrappings
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with a topknot ponytail
